---
title: "日本樹木属性ネットワーク"
---

```{=html}
<div id="tree-network-app" class="tree-network-app" aria-live="polite">
  <section class="tn-toolbar" aria-label="Network controls">
    <div class="tn-brand-block">
      <p class="tn-kicker">日本樹木属性ネットワーク</p>
      <h1>属性ノードを樹種エッジで結ぶ</h1>
    </div>
    <div class="tn-search-wrap">
      <label for="tn-search">検索</label>
      <input id="tn-search" type="search" placeholder="樹種名・学名・科・形質で検索" autocomplete="off" />
    </div>
    <div class="tn-controls-inline">
      <label class="tn-toggle">
        <input id="tn-show-species" type="checkbox" />
        <span>樹種エッジを表示</span>
      </label>
      <label class="tn-range">
        <span>最大エッジ数</span>
        <input id="tn-edge-limit" type="range" min="20" max="300" value="140" step="20" />
        <output id="tn-edge-limit-value">140</output>
      </label>
      <button id="tn-reset" type="button">リセット</button>
    </div>
  </section>

  <main class="tn-layout">
    <aside class="tn-panel tn-filter-panel" aria-label="Attribute filters">
      <div class="tn-panel-head">
        <h2>属性カテゴリ</h2>
        <span id="tn-species-count" class="tn-pill">0種</span>
      </div>
      <div id="tn-category-filters" class="tn-category-filters"></div>
      <div class="tn-panel-note">
        ノードは選択中の属性です。検索またはノード選択時に、該当する樹種エッジを強調します。
      </div>
    </aside>

    <section class="tn-graph-shell" aria-label="Tree attribute graph">
      <div class="tn-graph-status">
        <span id="tn-node-count">0 nodes</span>
        <span id="tn-edge-count">0 edges</span>
        <span id="tn-mode-label">aggregate</span>
      </div>
      <svg id="tn-graph" role="img" aria-label="日本樹木の属性ネットワーク"></svg>
    </section>

    <aside class="tn-panel tn-detail-panel" aria-label="Selection details">
      <div class="tn-panel-head">
        <h2>詳細</h2>
      </div>
      <div id="tn-detail" class="tn-detail"></div>
      <div class="tn-species-list-wrap">
        <h3>該当樹種</h3>
        <div id="tn-species-list" class="tn-species-list"></div>
      </div>
    </aside>
  </main>
</div>
```
